revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:方位神]][[zh:方位神]]


[[File:God of Toshitoku.png|thumb|right|220px|{{ill|Toshitoku-shin|ja|歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|qq=}}]]
'''Hōijin''' (方位神) refers to deities arising from the practice of {{ill|Kyūsei|ja|九星|1=Nine Stars|2=ja|3=九星|lt=Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyūsei|qq=}} divination. These gods are believed to influence fortune or misfortune depending on the direction in which they reside.
Hōijin move between directions following rules specific to each deity. Directions associated with auspicious deities are called "lucky directions" (吉方位), while those associated with malevolent deities are termed "unlucky directions" (凶方位).
During the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|qid=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}}, when travelers faced unlucky directions, they often practiced "{{ill|Katatagae|ja|方違え|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katatagae|qq=}}"—a ritual of temporarily traveling in a different direction before heading to their intended destination. Today, many temples and shrines perform prayers and rituals, collectively known as "Hōiyoke" (方位除け, 方除け, 八方除け), to ward off misfortune associated with unlucky directions.
== List of Hōijin ==
=== Auspicious Deities ===
* {{ill|Toshitoku-shin|ja|歳徳神|1=Toshitoku-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshitoku-shin|qq=}} (Eho)
* {{ill|Sairoku-shin|ja|歳禄神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sairoku-shin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Tsukitokugo|ja|月徳合|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukitokugo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Saiedatoku|ja|歳枝徳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiedatoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Saitokugo|ja|歳徳合|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitokugo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Seiki (Hōijin)|ja|生気|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seiki (Hōijin)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 生気論|1=Vitalism|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q191631}}
* {{ill|Sōsho (Hōijin)|ja|奏書|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōsho (Hōijin)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Tendō (Hōijin)|ja|天道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tendō (Hōijin)|1=Tendō (Hōijin)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11443601}}
* {{ill|Tiande|en|Tiande|qid=Q10939590|lt=Tendoku (Hōijin)|1=Tiande}}
* {{ill|Tendokugo|ja|天徳合|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tendokugo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Doctorate|en|Doctorate|qid=Q849697|lt=Hakase (Hōijin)|1=Doctorate}}
=== Malevolent Deities ===
==== Divine Threats (Shinsatsu) ====
* {{ill|Ten'ichi-shin|ja|天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ichi-shin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11442153}}
* {{ill|Konjin|en|Konjin|qid=Q6429460|lt=Konjin|1=Konjin}} (Ōkonjin, Himekonjin)
* {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}
** {{ill|Taisai-shin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisai-shin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (usually an auspicious deity)
** {{ill|Daishōgun|ja|大将軍|1=Daishōgun (directional deity)|lt=Daishōgun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun (directional deity)|qq=}}
** {{ill|Taion-shin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taion-shin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taionjin|qq=}}
** {{ill|Saigyōshin|ja|歳刑神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saigyōshin|qq=}}
** {{ill|Saiha Shin|ja|歳破神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha Shin|qq=}}
** {{ill|Saisetsujin|ja|歳殺神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saisetsujin|qq=}}
** {{ill|Ōbanjin|ja|黄幡神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōbanjin|qq=}}
** {{ill|Hyōbijin|ja|豹尾神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōbijin|qq=}}
==== Directional Threats (Hōsatsu) ====
* {{ill|Honmei-satsu|ja|本命殺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Honmei-satsu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11548077}}
* {{ill|Tekisatsu|ja|的殺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tekisatsu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11548077}} (Honmeitekisatsu)
* {{ill|Ankensatsu|ja|暗剣殺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ankensatsu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11548077}}
* {{ill|Gogōsatsu|ja|五黄殺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gogōsatsu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11548077}}
* {{ill|Saiha|ja|歳破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11548077}} (same as Saiha-shin)
* {{ill|Gekisatsu|ja|月破|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gekisatsu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 気学|1=Honmei-satsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11548077}}
* {{ill|Teiitaichū|ja|定位対沖|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiitaichū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
==== Other Unlucky Directions ====
* {{ill|Kimon|ja|鬼門|1=Kimon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kimon|qq=}}
* {{ill|Tenmon (Hōijin)|ja|天門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon (Hōijin)|1=Tenmon (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10940802}}
* {{ill|Toten-satsu|ja|都天殺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toten-satsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|White Tiger (mythology)|en|White Tiger (mythology)|qid=Q1072455|lt=Byakko (Hōijin)|1=White Tiger (mythology)}}
* {{ill|Shifu|ja|死符|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shifu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Byōfu|ja|病符|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Byōfu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Kōsatsu|ja|劫殺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōsatsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Saisatsu|ja|災殺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saisatsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Sanshitsu|ja|蚕室|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanshitsu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|Nichiyū-shin|ja|日遊神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nichiyū-shin|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11442153}}

== See Also ==
